response:

```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS total_revenue
FROM ord_hdr oh
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM ord_ln ol
  INNER JOIN ord_rtn ortn ON ol.ord_ln_id = ortn.ord_ln_id
  WHERE ol.ord_id = oh.ord_id
)",
  "reason": "Identifies orders with returned line items and sums their total revenue once per order."
}
```
